prose:
Frontier orbital calculation on TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF UKS), tier 'standard', gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell doublet). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at this level). Density fitting: off (exact four-center two-electron integrals). SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true, status = ok.

Key results:
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 3.8724203 eV (headline value)
- HOMO energy: −6.3375439 eV
- LUMO energy: −2.4651235 eV
- Total energy: −483.88366 Hartree

Method: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2.
Command: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2
Output JSON: tempo_frontier_dft.json
